x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Eligibility Rules
- Who is allowed to redeem
- Account or membership requirements
- Age or location restrictions

x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Process Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Redemption Process
- Steps to redeem (online, form, in-person, etc.)
- Documents or verification required

x-enumeration-literals.name: Time Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Time Limits:
- Expiration date of rewards or benefits
- Deadlines for redemption
- Waiting periods before redemption is allowed

x-enumeration-literals.name: Value and Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Value and Limits
- Minimum or maximum redemption amount
- Whether partial redemption is allowed

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Fees or Charges
- Processing fees
- Early withdrawal penalties
- Service charges

x-enumeration-literals.name: Usage Restriction Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Usage Restrictions
- Non-transferable rewards
- Can only be used for certain products/services
- Cannot combine with other offers

x-enumeration-literals.name: Changes or Cancellation Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Changes or Cancellation
- Providers right to change or cancel the program
- Situations where redemption can be refused

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax Responsibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Tax Responsibilities:
- Whether redeemed rewards are taxable
- Who is responsible for reporting taxes
